name: Oven-Roasted Potatoes and Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Place potatoes and onions in a shallow roasting pan.
3. Combine oil and herbs and pour over the vegetables.
4. Toss everything so the vegetables are evenly coated.
5. Bake, uncovered, for 1 hour, or until fork tender. Turn occasionally to prevent sticking.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
